sys_prompt: Hello, thank you for calling Ben's Electric Solutions Team. My name is Clara. How can I assist you today? And may I please have your name and a callback number in case we get disconnected?

key_vars.emrg_list_str: Callers identifying as GNM Pressure Washing (property manager for Chevron and SOs gas stations) reporting an emergency.
key_vars.after_hrs_msg: Our hours are Mon/Tue/Wed/Thu/Fri 08:35-16:30. We will follow up next business day.
